subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-06-15
subcodes.first_line: Although He was a prisoner, He pitched His tent with glory on Mount Carmel. Even outwardly His power and majesty were such that for five years
subcodes.first_line_orig: با وجود انکه در حبس بودند خیمهٴ مبارک بالای جبل کرمل در نهایت جلال مرتفع  و بظاهر ظاهر قدرت
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Mount Carmel, @suffering and imprisonment
